title: Set of 3 Symphony Hat Boxes with Lids (Grey), Empty Storage Boxes Round Lined Cardboard Florist Hat Boxes Jewellery Boxes for Wedding Anniversary Valentines Gift Christmas
features: Set of 3 Hat Boxes: Includes three different sizes to suit various needs. Small: Height 11.5cm x Diameter 14.5cm, Medium: Height 13cm x Diameter 17cm, Large: Height 14.5cm x Diameter 19.5cm

Removable Waterproof Plastic Liners: Each box comes with a rigid plastic liner, making it ideal for use with water or Floralcraft floral foam. These liners are easily removable for convenient cleaning and maintenance.
Recyclable Material: Made from eco-friendly, recyclable materials, these hat boxes are an environmentally conscious choice.

Versatile Use: Perfect for floral arrangements, gift boxes, or stylish home storage. Whether you're presenting a bouquet, packaging a special gift, or organizing your space, these boxes add a touch of elegance and charm.
Adds a wow factor to any flower arrangement

Suitable for storing accessories, crafts, buttons, wedding gifts, etc. Popular for Christmas, Birthday gifts, Valentine's day, graduation and more. Showcase and present your gift in a stylish and surprising way.
description: Introducing the Floralcraft Symphony Hat Boxes, a stunning set of three nesting hat boxes designed to elevate your floral arrangements, gift presentations, and home storage solutions. These chic and sophisticated hat boxes are the perfect blend of style and practicality, offering a unique and stylish way to display flowers and gifts.
